details.redacted_summary: # MEMORY.md - User: ou_4d6506f2fc5e4f989e0672a33d7cc24e - First interaction: 2026-02-26 - User: ou_d8d4047e9083cc44527a2429b4f757a4 - First interaction: 2026-02-27 - 喜欢绿色 - User: ou_2375a992dea28a92946c5e897e37151b - First interaction: 2026-02-27 - User: ou_a690691bd462030c16e4b4c60ae99e2a - First interaction: 2026-02-28 ## 海报设计偏好 (ou_720d005e222d05c44b44dee631ae4dc0) - 风格：清晰明亮，橙色系为主色 - 布局：一页展示完全，不截断 - 不要侧边和底部装饰线条 - 字体字号：标题和内容都要大，由 AI 自主调整 - 要有 emoji / 卡通元素，不要太单调 - 要有设计感和审美，不要死板 ## Technical Issues ### Monitor logs 打开失败 (2026-03-05) - **现象**：`upstream connect error / Connection refused` - **根因**：crabwalk 进程异常退出 - **解决**：检查并重启 crabwalk 进程 ### 飞书机器人不回复，WebUI正常 (2026-04-16) - **现象**：WebUI 后台能正常对话，但飞书私聊/群聊机器人不回复 - **解决**：去 openclaw.chj.cloud → Skills 页面 → 更新飞书插件，然后重启实例 - **来源**：高明达确认，用户李熠柃验证修复

triage.rationale: The summary contains team-scope chat memory with identifiable individuals, internal service/domain references, and operational incident details. It is not merely safe personal/project agent experience and would require review/redaction before release.
suggested_redactions: Remove or generalize named individuals mentioned as confirming or validating fixes.
Redact internal service domains, instance names, and plugin/service identifiers if not public.
Generalize operational incident details, error strings, root causes, and remediation steps that reveal internal infrastructure.
Keep Feishu user identifiers redacted and avoid linking preferences to specific users.
